name: new-relic
description: Run NRQL queries and inspect entities and issues via the New Relic NerdGraph API

envVars.name: NEW_RELIC_API_KEY
envVars.description: New Relic user API key (starts with NRAK-), sent as the API-Key header

tools.name: Run NRQL Query
tools.description: Run an NRQL query against a New Relic account and return the results

endpoint.query: query($accountId: Int!, $nrql: Nrql!) { actor { account(id: $accountId) { nrql(query: $nrql) { results } } } }

nrql.description: NRQL query, e.g. SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction SINCE 1 hour ago

tools.name: Search Entities
tools.description: Search monitored entities (apps, hosts, services) with an entity search query

endpoint.query: query($query: String!, $cursor: String) { actor { entitySearch(query: $query) { count results(cursor: $cursor) { entities { guid name entityType domain type } nextCursor } } } }

query.description: Entity search query, e.g. name LIKE 'checkout' AND domain = 'APM'

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response's nextCursor

tools.name: Get Entity
tools.description: Get an entity's details and tags by GUID

endpoint.query: query($guid: EntityGuid!) { actor { entity(guid: $guid) { guid name entityType domain type tags { key values } } } }

tools.name: List Issues
tools.description: List alert issues from the last day in an account (queries the NrAiIssue event type via NRQL)

endpoint.query: query($accountId: Int!) { actor { account(id: $accountId) { nrql(query: "FROM NrAiIssue SELECT latest(title) AS title, latest(priority) AS priority, latest(event) AS lastEvent SINCE 1 day ago FACET issueId LIMIT 100") { results } } } }

prompts.title: Error rate check
prompts.prompt: Run a New Relic NRQL query for the transaction error rate in the last hour and summarize the result.

prompts.title: Open issues
prompts.prompt: List the open New Relic issues in my account ordered by priority.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: New Relic NerdGraph Setup

steps.title: Sign up for New Relic
steps.description: Free accounts at https://newrelic.com include full API access. Note your account ID from the account picker or the URL — NRQL and issue tools need it.

steps.title: Create a user API key
steps.description: Go to https://one.newrelic.com/api-keys and create a key of type 'User' (it starts with NRAK-). User keys are required for NerdGraph.

steps.title: Set the environment variable
steps.description: Add the key to your .env as NEW_RELIC_API_KEY=NRAK-...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run Search Entities with a query like "domain = 'APM'", or Run NRQL Query with your account ID.

notes: All tools are GraphQL calls to https://api.newrelic.com/graphql with the key in the 'API-Key' header
EU-region accounts use api.eu.newrelic.com; these tools target the US endpoint
NRQL and issue tools take your numeric account ID as a parameter — find it under Administration → Access management → Accounts
